S.FORM: = Mahamadou Issoufou = Mntucing hngkawas 1951 idas jiyax ka Mahamadou Issoufou ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Niger ta sayang o kiya ka Mahamadou Issoufou, pnaah hngkawas 2011 idas 4 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = maħamadou issou*ou = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ɟijax ka maħamadou issou*ou ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan nigəɾ ta sajaŋ o kija ka maħamadou issou*ou, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Mahamadou Issoufou = Mntucing hngkawas 1951 idas jiyax ka Mahamadou Issoufou ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Niger ta sayang o kiya ka Mahamadou Issoufou, pnaah hngkawas 2011 idas 4 jiyax 7 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = maħamadou issou*ou = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ɟijax ka maħamadou issou*ou ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan nigəɾ ta sajaŋ o kija ka maħamadou issou*ou, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
